content: Bebas Neue for headings, DM Sans for body text
Dark cinematic theme: bg #0a0a0f, text #f0f0f5, accent #3b82f6, gold stars #d4a853

title: Tech stack
rationale: Next.js 14 App Router + React 18 + Framer Motion + Tailwind CSS + TypeScript

title: Site architecture
rationale: Multi-page: /services, /results, /process, /about, /reviews, /faq, /contact. Each service type gets its own sub-page under /services/

description: Supabase URL had typo: bixxnnimanqzaeqrvto vs bixxnnimangqzaeqrvto (missing g)
resolution: Always verify Supabase project URL resolves via DNS before coding against it

description: Service sub-pages rendered in left 35% of screen
resolution: Check parent layout constraints, not just inner container max-widths

description: Navbar logo showed as gray box on some pages
resolution: Use /brand_assets/logo-transparent.png with Next.js Image component, no domain prefix

content: All animation components must be client components with 'use client' directive
Use viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-80px' }} on all scroll-triggered animations
Office email: office@cradjusters.com — Address: 7900 Oak Ln Suite 400, Miami Lakes FL 33016
Instagram placeholder cards until Meta Graph API is connected — code is ready, just needs token
